message:
🌱 Add alertmanager: telegram_config.api_url should be optional mission (#1742)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,74 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "alertmanager-2876-telegram-config-api-url-should-be-optional",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "alertmanager: telegram_config.api_url should be optional",
+    "description": "telegram_config.api_url should be optional. Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "feature",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current alertmanager deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your alertmanager version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nhelm list -n alertmanager 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working alertmanager installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review alertmanager configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant alertmanager configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get configmap -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=alertmanager\n```\nI just updated to alertmanager-0.24.0 and went to use the new Telegram integration."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for telegram_config.api_url should be optional",
+        "description": "Apply the configuration change to resolve the issue:\n```yaml\nalertmanager, version 0.24.0 (branch: HEAD, revision: f484b17fa3c583ed1b2c8bbcec20ba1db2aa5f11)\n  build user:       root@45f97b18b623\n  build date:       20220325-09:29:04\n  go version:       go1.17.8\n  platform:         linux/arm\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n alertmanager -l app.kubernetes.io/name=alertmanager\nkubectl get events -n alertmanager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"telegram_config.api_url should be optional\" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "See the source issue for the community-verified solution: https://github.com/prometheus/alertmanager/issues/2876",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "alertmanager, version 0.24.0 (branch: HEAD, revision: f484b17fa3c583ed1b2c8bbcec20ba1db2aa5f11)\n  build user:       root@45f97b18b623\n  build date:       20220325-09:29:04\n  go version:       go1.17.8\n  platform:         linux/arm"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
